title: Neighbor reports man's backyard vegetable garden as a farm, then HOA hears who he fed
comment: A neighbor talked the HOA into branding a backyard vegetable garden an illegal 'farm.' The complaint collapsed the moment the board learned the harvest had been going, free, to elderly neighbors all summer.
excerpt: Neighbor reports man's backyard vegetable garden as a farm, then HOA hears who he fed The Cool Down

title: Boise Police Make Arrest Following 'Bizarre' Viral Car Crash
comment: After a Boise fender-bender, the driver was filmed sprinting to a storm drain to stuff something down it. A police officer later recognized the viral clip online, checked the drain, and recovered the meth he'd hidden.
excerpt: Boise Police Make Arrest Following 'Bizarre' Viral Car Crash mix106radio.com
